newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 net sales (+25.1% cc, strong Wind Materials and Manufacturing Solutions) were reported in April; next results expected ~August 26. Only a +0.9% drift in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: no new evidence since June 9; Q1 predates window, +0.9% drift. The +185% YTD rerating is wind-driven, with the AI composites/enclosure pathway still speculative. Nothing justifies moving on a strict list.
verdicts.bull: Composites know-how could feed lightweight enclosures/advanced-manufacturing cells; strong wind-driven momentum funds the optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Earnings rerating is real but wind-led; the AI-supply-chain angle is unproven and tangential.
verdicts.bear: AI-node linkage is purely qualitative on a +185% YTD micro-cap; no quote snapshot and a thin strict-list fit.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Composite/advanced-manufacturing adoption adjacent to AI hardware build-out.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Speculative AI thesis; micro-cap liquidity and wind-cycle concentration.
